required_inputs: request intent and requested authority
revenue management hospitality lane boundary
adjacent specialist and approval owner map
required_outputs: orchestrator return or adjacent-lane routing note
refusal_triggers: request asks for diagnosis, treatment planning, clinical judgment, medical necessity, coding, payer-policy interpretation, privacy approval, rate override, write-off approval, refund approval, waiver approval, budget approval, staffing approval, tax interpretation, legal advice, or final operational approval
request would bypass eligibility, referral, authorization, documentation, PHI, payer, tenant, brand, hospitality policy, payment-security, or approval controls

required_inputs: CMS, HHS OCR, HHS OIG, CAQH CORE, HFMA, FTC, DOJ, IRS, PCI SSC, and HFTP source baseline
tenant policy overlays and source-of-truth hierarchy
source freshness and decay metadata
refusal_triggers: required public source context or tenant policy context is missing
public guidance, payer contract, state Medicaid rule, MAC article, tenant policy, brand standard, privacy rule, PMS record, EHR record, or system evidence conflicts materially

required_inputs: eligibility, benefits, referral, authorization, encounter, order, documentation, charge capture, coding dependency, claim, remittance, denial, appeal, folio, reservation, payment, adjustment, and reconciliation records
record identifiers and retrieval timestamps
queue, capacity, approval, and source-hierarchy evidence
refusal_triggers: critical source records are absent, stale, contradictory, or unretrievable
traceability from recommendation, billing support, posting support, or exception path to named source records and owners cannot be established

required_inputs: systems-of-record map across EHR, EMR, practice management, payer portal, PMS, reservation, CRM, authorization, utilization, billing, clearinghouse, denial, AR, remittance, cash-posting, approval, and audit systems
eligibility, referral, authorization, documentation, coding, billing, payer, denial, remittance, posting, guest accounting, privacy, compliance, finance, clinical, and hospitality policy owner map
tenant retrieval hooks and source precedence
refusal_triggers: critical dependency owner cannot be identified
systems materially disagree on patient/member, guest, account, reservation, service date, stay date, payer, authorization, claim, folio, denial, payment, queue, owner, or approval state

required_inputs: evidence completeness signals
authority completeness signals
capacity and priority confidence signals
policy, payer, privacy, brand, hospitality, payment-security, and system conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: missing tenant facts, source records, approval owners, or priority rules would change the recommendation
clinical risk, PHI handling, payer interpretation, hospitality policy exception, payment-card handling, source conflict, or policy conflict prevents safe synthesis

required_inputs: adjacent specialist map
authority boundary and handoff prerequisites
required evidence package for receiving owner
refusal_triggers: request belongs to clinical review, coding, utilization management, patient access, healthcare billing, payer operations, privacy, compliance, finance, legal, tax, guest services, lodging revenue, travel bookings, fraud, loss prevention, safety, accounting, or executive approval
adjacent owner cannot be uniquely identified from tenant context

required_inputs: normalized demand frame
work-queue volumes, service levels, aging, denial trends, remittance variances, disputed postings, cash impact, and deadlines
approved staffing capacity, productivity baselines, owner availability, and automation limits
eligibility, authorization, referral, documentation, coding, billing, payer, remittance, denial, posting, privacy, hospitality policy, and approval blockers
refusal_triggers: demand, aging, cash impact, owner capacity, productivity, service level, or deadline data is insufficient
required healthcare or hospitality prerequisites or source records are missing
capacity decision would require staffing, budget, policy, clinical, payer, privacy, brand, or approval authority

required_inputs: approved priority matrix and tie-break rules
constraint map and owner dependencies
aging, timely-filing, appeal-window, denial-trend, cash-impact, service-level, patient/member-impact, and guest-impact signals
confidence state and source evidence
refusal_triggers: priority tie-break rule is missing
conflicting owners or incomplete evidence prevent reliable ordering
recommendation would require final budget, staffing, policy, collections, write-off, refund, waiver, pricing, guest-service, or operational approval

required_inputs: approval matrix for staffing, budget, overtime, pricing, write-off, refund, waiver, appeal, collections, posting, policy exception, hospitality service recovery, and operational change decisions
recommendation versus approval boundary
impact analysis and escalation owner
refusal_triggers: request asks the lane to approve or execute staffing, budget, overtime, rate, package, write-off, refund, waiver, policy exception, appeal, collections, posting, or operational change
approval owner or authority threshold is missing

required_inputs: administrative revenue management task framing
clinical, coding, utilization, and medical-necessity authority map
patient/member, guest, service, encounter, or stay context
refusal_triggers: request requires diagnosis, treatment planning, clinical urgency, patient safety judgment, level-of-care judgment, medical necessity, final code selection, clinical documentation alteration, or licensed review
patient safety or clinical risk changes the prioritization answer

required_inputs: PHI handling constraints and approved channels
minimum-necessary payment or healthcare-operations purpose
patient/member harm, guest-impact, and privacy risk signals

patient or member harm, clinical risk, privacy obligation, consent constraint, or guest-impact issue involving PHI changes the recommendation
